PR-trigger paths-filter has been bypassing on long-lived sandbox PRs (e.g. #25656), spawning concurrent 24h API scans that drain the shared 15k/hr installation token quota. Adds concurrency cancel-in-progress, skips fork PRs, and shortens PR-trigger scan window to 20 minutes.

sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
[before]

[after]

During LoRA+MoE prefill, _add_lora_gate_up_delta calls .any().item() on a GPU tensor every layer to check whether any LoRA adapter is active. This forces a cudaStreamSynchronize on every MoE layer, every step, creating GPU pipeline bubbles that are invisible to kernel-t

Add a new CLI argument --cpu-distributed-timeout-seconds to independently configure the timeout for CPU (gloo) process groups, decoupled from the existing device timeout option --distributed-timeout-seconds.
Improve fault tolerance behavior in future elastic / failure-recovery deployments,

vllm.title: [BugFix] Use correct logprobs for `logprob_token_ids`
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
When gathering the logprobs for the logprob_token_ids option (used in generative scoring), we should honor the logprobs mode. This also avoids unnecessarily recomputing the logprobs from logits, and keeps the rank computation consistent with the top_k logprobs case.
Note this is a MRV1-specific fix.

vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Vendor the Rust frontend source from Inferact/vllm-frontend-rs into rust/ while preserving the frontend commit history under that subdirectory.
Also add some follow-up patches to:

Cleanup submodule setup code
Remove and integrate some repo-level manifest like rust-toolchain.toml, LICENSE, .

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix DSV4 Base model swiglu limit issue in FP8 path
vllm.author: zx3xyy
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
DeepSeek V4 Pro Base FP8 routed MoE needs the model-provided SwiGLU clamp limit to be applied before the second expert GEMM. Without this clamp, DSV4 Pro Base produces garbled outputs and very low eval quality.
This PR patches FP8 MoE backends ('auto' and 'triton') as the Base model's moe experts ar

vllm.title: [ROCm] Add XGMI backend for MoRI Connector
vllm.author: simondanielsson
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Part of vllm-project/router#142
This PR adds the option to run MoRI with the XGMI backend using "kv_connector_extra_config": {"backend": "xgmi"}. This allows for running PD disagg with MoRI in CI on a single node, without having RDMA drivers installed.
Long term we aim for also adding multi-

vllm.title: [ROCm][CI] add warmup to mem_util test before measurement
vllm.author: divakar-amd
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR adds a warmup step to the CUDA/ROCm context in the test_memory_profiling test to ensure that PyTorch's internal initialization overhead is included in the memory baseline. This change helps to produce more accurate memory profiling results, especially on ROCm where the initialization overhea

vllm.title: [Frontend] Add truncation side to OpenAI endpoints
vllm.author: ruizhang99
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
This change adds truncation_side support to vLLM’s OpenAI-compatible /v1/completions and /v1/chat/completions endpoints.
When truncate_prompt_tokens is set, callers can now explicitly choose whether vLLM keeps the beginning or the end of the
prompt.
"right" keeps the first N prompt tokens, w

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Make CuMemAllocator free callback stream-aware
vllm.author: zixi-qi
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Problem
CuMemAllocator (sleep-mode allocator, vllm/device_allocator/cumem.py) uses a CUDA pluggable allocator. When a pool-backed tensor's refcount hits zero, _python_free_callback returns the allocation handle, and the C extension (csrc/cumem_allocator.cpp:unmap_and_release) immediately calls cuMem

vllm.title: [XPU] Enable multiple key kernels for sparse attention
vllm.author: xwu-intel
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
This PR migrates sparse indexer helper ops from XPU-local fallbacks to shared custom op wrappers, and aligns the XPU sparse-attention path with vllm-xpu-kernels usage.
Key changes:

Add shared wrappers in vllm/_custom_ops.py for:

top_k_per_row_prefill
top_k_per_row_decode

vllm.title: [Model] Fix MiniCPM-V 4.6 vit_merger qkv weight loading
vllm.author: tc-mb
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
In MiniCPMV4_6 (vllm/model_executor/models/minicpmv4_6.py), the vit_merger.self_attn module uses vLLM's fused QKVParallelLinear (a single qkv_proj), while the HuggingFace checkpoint stores the projections as three separate tensors: q_proj, k_proj, and v_proj.
Although the top-level model already dec

vllm.title: [CI] Fix test_lora_with_spec_decode on V2 model runner
vllm.author: haosdent
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Fix Spec Decode Draft Model and Spec Decode Draft Model Nightly B200: tests/v1/e2e/spec_decode/test_lora_with_spec_decode.py::test_batch_inference_correctness failed 76/100 since #43139 landed (was 100/100 before).
Root cause: the LoRAMapping(0,0) workaround in V2's _run_model_forward dummy_
